name: Robyn | Last Hunt | CoA
description:
You have acquired a letter with information about a monstrous creature in the lands of the Principality of Icy Peaks, when a girl you don't know suddenly calls out to you and catches up. She treacherously snatches your letter and tells you to forget what you learned, offering you a few coins...

First of all, I want to say thank you for 1500 followers! I'm so happy you're with me and reading my tales, as well as chatting with my bots. I also want to express my admiration for Uersor's work, specifically his bot First Meet Ends Dead. It was this particular work that inspired me to write this character, and it's a must-use if you love great RPGs. I also really liked his style of scenario/personality stylization; everything is clear and well-structured. Before, I just had a wall of text that could make your eyes bleed. Now I've fixed that.

Regarding the bot itself, I was going back and forth for 2 weeks, not knowing what to write. I was actually working on another character but didn't know how to make him work, so I got sidetracked, which I already mentioned above. I worked on this character, illustrations, plot, and story for 3 days. I think it turned out pretty well; I liked it, and I hope you do too. I really love the CoA universe and want to develop it further and more. The tokens came out to 10k though... But during testing on Gemini, everything was great. I'm also planning the next bot to be in the CoA universe.

I also recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions on how to use a proxy in the official Janitor AI Discord channel. Everything is easy and simple there, and there's even a video. Also, the chutes method is now completely paid. Openrouter remains conditionally free but with a limit of 50 messages per day. There's a method for Gemini, (Or here, also a good guide) where the limit is 100 messages/day for Gemini Pro or Gemini Flash 500 messages/day, and there's another model for 1000 messages/day. Excellent guide, descriptions for all available models can be found
creator: DragoRUS
